## Common misunderstandings

<!-- discovery gap: to be completed after research conversations. Expected input: what unrepresented people most commonly get wrong about the disclosure duty — e.g. believing that assets held in a company or another person's name do not need to be disclosed, not understanding that the duty continues after Form E is exchanged, underestimating the consequences of non-disclosure, or not knowing that a consent order can be set aside for non-disclosure made before it was agreed. -->
